tweet: just shipped 18 PRs. added an ai video generator, a carl jung bot, and a browser extension for images. on the infra side, we stopped counting 4xx errors as successful requests in the model monitor, because reality matters. docs are updated too. 🐝
alt_tweet: merged 18 PRs. you can now generate videos, chat with carl jung, and use the new pollinations-ui. on the backend, we fixed the official badge logo and excluded 4xx errors from our success rate metrics. nature is healing.
image_prompt: Dynamic pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot (yellow body, dark brown stripes, pink blush, tiny builder hardhat) and a chunky Monitor Robot high-fiving over a glowing retro terminal. The screen shows a lime green (#ecf874) chart where the error line drops to zero. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Large visible pixels, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, warm lighting. High contrast within the brand palette, scroll-stopping energy, Stardew Valley vibes.
reasoning: Contrasts the absurdity of a Carl Jung bot with the mundane reality of fixing metric bugs. Dry, specific, and lists actual shipped items.
